plugins.prepareCmd: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); const nextVersion = '${nextRelease.version}'; const tauriPath = 'src-tauri/tauri.conf.json'; const cargoPath = 'src-tauri/Cargo.toml'; const tauri = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(tauriPath, 'utf8')); tauri.version = nextVersion; fs.writeFileSync(tauriPath, JSON.stringify(tauri, null, 2) + '\n'); const cargo = fs.readFileSync(cargoPath, 'utf8').replace(/^version\s*=\s*\".*\"/m, 'version = \"' + nextVersion + '\"'); fs.writeFileSync(cargoPath, cargo); console.log('Synced release version to Tauri config:', nextVersion);"
